---
title: "Projects & Publications"
output: html_document
---

# Projects & Publications

## Current Work – FSR Global (Research Associate)

### Resource Adequacy Handbook

I am the primary researcher preparing a **two-part techno-policy handbook on power sector Resource Adequacy**,
covering:

- Theory and taxonomy of resource adequacy and its metrics  
- Resilience and flexibility requirements  
- Integrated Resource Adequacy Assessment (I-RAA) for modern power systems  

### Energy Literacy & NLP (Erasmus+ Project)

Lead researcher on an **Erasmus+ project** focused on understanding **energy literacy among adolescents** in European Union countries and beyond, using **Natural Language Processing (NLP)** to analyse student responses.

### Teaching & Guest Lectures

Guest Lecturer and Teaching Assistant for the **“Electricity Sector for Energy Transition”** course with the **Energy Transition Academy**, delivering sessions on:

- Why an integrated framework on resource adequacy is needed  
- Modern resource adequacy, resilience, and flexibility metrics  

---

## Previous Work – Datarivu (Data Analyst)

Worked with **author and data journalist Rukmini Shrinivasan** and the Datarivu team on data-based projects and op-eds related to:

- Law & order  
- National and global politics  
- Population and socio-economic issues  

Collaborated with organisations such as:

- **Omidyar Network India**  
- **PANOS South Asia**  
- Government partners on survey reporting

### Selected Articles (Data Analysis Support)

- *“December 2012 sexual assault case: Ten years on, the wrong lessons”* (2022)  
- *“Communal rift highest in India, says Pew study”* (2022)  
- *“It’s time to discuss depopulation”* (2022)  
- *“Few Women, Many Lawyers: What A New Dataset On High Court Judges Reveals”* (2022)

---

## Earlier Experience – Fedina (Intern)

**Fedina**, Bangalore – *July 2021 – December 2021*

- Mobilised retired unorganised sector workers for meetings and outreach  
- Coordinated with **BBMP** to support mid-day meal schemes  
- Collected audio-visual material documenting the lives and struggles of retired unorganised sector workers

---

## Activities & Leadership

- **Guest Lecturer** – *Why We Need an Integrated Framework on Resource Adequacy*  
  - Electricity Sector for Energy Transition Course, Energy Transition Academy (2025)

- **Operations & Outreach** – Confederation of Young Leaders – UN75 India (2020)  
  - State in-charge (Tamil Nadu) coordinating SDG-themed meetings and outreach

- **Treasurer**, Department of Economics – Madras Christian College (2017–2018)

- Participant, **Environmental Leadership and Diplomacy Workshop** – US Consulate General, Chennai (2019)

- Participant, **National Conference on Environmental Leadership and Policy Making** – India International Centre, New Delhi (2019)

---

## Reports (Selected)

- *Integrated Resource Adequacy Assessment Framework: A Holistic Approach to Power System Reliability and Resilience* (2025)  
- *Bridging Continents: European CBET Insights for South Asia’s Energy Future* (2024)

---

## Awards

- All India **6th Rank**, Sarala Birla Memorial National Article Writing Competition – Birla Global University (2020)  
- **Winner**, Finals, Maria Philip Memorial Inter Collegiate Debate Competition – XIME (2017)  
- **Winner**, South Zone, Maria Philip Memorial Debate – XIME (2017)  
- **Second Runner-up**, Economics Elocution – University of Madras (2017)
